seo.title: One-Stop Commercial Ad Production – AI Video Workflow | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create professional commercial ads from concept to final video with AI. Generate storyboards, scenes, and cinematic videos—the best AI commercial generator for product commercial photography.

hero.title: One-Stop Commercial Ad Production
hero.description: Transform your product into a cinematic commercial ad with one AI workflow. From reference images to storyboard generation, scene creation, and final video production—all powered by Nano Banana Pro and Sora 2. Perfect for brands, agencies, and marketers who need high-impact video ads without a production team.

steps.title: Upload product reference images
steps.description: Provide reference images of your product from different angles. The AI analyzes these to create consistent 3-view renders for your commercial.

steps.title: AI generates storyboard script
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates a professional ad storyboard with 15+ cinematic shots—including product showcases, action sequences, and atmospheric B-roll scenes.

steps.title: Generate storyboard frames
steps.description: The workflow produces high-quality storyboard images for each shot, combining your product, environment, and character elements with cinematic composition.

steps.title: Create final video with Sora 2
steps.description: Sora 2 transforms your storyboard frames into dynamic video clips with professional motion, ready for your commercial campaign.

whoIsFor.title: Built for brands and creative teams
whoIsFor.subtitle: From startups to agencies, see who creates commercial ads with AI.

items.question: What is the One-Stop Commercial Ad Production workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow creates complete commercial video ads from product reference images. It generates storyboards, scene compositions, and final videos using Nano Banana Pro for image generation and Sora 2 for video production.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for generating storyboard frames, product renders, and scene compositions. Sora 2 handles the final video generation, creating cinematic motion from your storyboard images.

items.question: What kind of input do I need?
items.answer: You provide reference images of your product from different angles. The AI uses these to create consistent product renders and integrate them into cinematic commercial scenes.

items.question: How long are the generated videos?
items.answer: The workflow generates approximately 20-second commercial videos with 15+ shots, including product showcases, action sequences, and atmospheric B-roll footage.

items.question: Can I customize the storyboard style?
items.answer: Yes, you can provide direction for the ad style, mood, and specific shots you want. The AI adapts the storyboard to match your brand's visual identity and campaign goals.

items.question: What industries is this suitable for?
items.answer: The workflow works for any product category—automotive, consumer electronics, fashion, food & beverage, luxury goods, and more. The AI adapts the commercial style to your product type.

items.question: Can I use this for social media ads?
items.answer: Absolutely. The generated videos are perfect for social media advertising on platforms like Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Facebook, as well as traditional digital advertising.

items.question: How does this compare to traditional video production?
items.answer: This workflow delivers professional-quality commercial videos in minutes instead of weeks, at a fraction of the cost of traditional production—no crew, equipment, or post-production team required.
